<span class="hub-inline-icon" aria-hidden="true"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M8 2c0 2.2 1.8 4 4 4s4-1.8 4-4h-2c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2s-2-.9-2-2H8zm8 20c0-2.2-1.8-4-4-4s-4 1.8-4 4h2c0-1.1.9-2 2-2s2 .9 2 2h2zM7 6h2c.5 2.2 2.3 4 4.5 4S17.5 8.2 18 6h2c-.6 3.3-3.1 5.8-6.5 6.4V14h-1v1.4C9.1 14.8 6.6 12.3 6 9zm10 9c-.5 2.2-2.3 4-4.5 4S8.5 17.2 8 15H6c.6 3.3 3.1 5.8 6.5 6.4V18h1v1.4c3.4-.6 5.9-3.1 6.5-6.4h-2z"/></svg></span>
